content_blocks.text: 1. Bṛ. Jā. 1.4. The 12 Rasis are supposed to represent the several parts of the body of Kalapurusha (कालपुरुष), Mesha (Aries) representing the head and so on.

शीर्षांस्यबादुहृदयं जठरं कठिवस्तिमेह नौरुयुगम् ।
जानू जसे चरणों कालस्याङ्गानि राशयोऽजाद्याः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
शीर्षांस्यबादुहृदयं जठरं कठिवस्तिमेह नौरुयुगम् ।
जानू जसे चरणों कालस्याङ्गानि राशयोऽजाद्याः ॥
verse_data.topic: Verse describing body parts represented by Rasis

content_blocks.text: The object of this division is also distinctly expressed in the same work thus:

verse_data.topic: Verse on determining body part conditions based on planetary influences

content_blocks.text: i.e., to find out the full growth or otherwise of the different parts of the body of the owner of the horoscope according as the Ras is typifying them are connected with benefic or malefic planets,

verse_data.translation: i.e., to find out the full growth or otherwise of the different parts of the body of the owner of the horoscope according as the Ras is typifying them are connected with benefic or malefic planets,

content_blocks.text: In the case of all horoscopes, the several parts of the body referred to above should be understood to be represented by the signs beginning from the Lagna.

verse_data.translation: In the case of all horoscopes, the several parts of the body referred to above should be understood to be represented by the signs beginning from the Lagna.
verse_data.topic: Association of body parts with signs from Lagna

content_blocks.text:
व्यत्यस्तोभयपुच्छमस्तकयुतौ मीनौ सकुंभो नर-
स्तौली चापधरस्तुरंगजघनो नक्रो मृगास्यो भवेत् ।
वीणाढ्यं सगर्द नृयुग्ममबला नौस्था ससस्यानला
शेषाः स्वस्वगुणाभिधानसदृशाः सर्वे खदेशाश्रयाः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
व्यत्यस्तोभयपुच्छमस्तकयुतौ मीनौ सकुंभो नर-
स्तौली चापधरस्तुरंगजघनो नक्रो मृगास्यो भवेत् ।
वीणाढ्यं सगर्द नृयुग्ममबला नौस्था ससस्यानला
शेषाः स्वस्वगुणाभिधानसदृशाः सर्वे खदेशाश्रयाः ॥
verse_data.topic: Description of signs and their representations

content_blocks.text: Sloka. 9. Sign Pisces consists of two fishes with their two tails and heads in reversed positions. Aquarius is symbolised by a man with a pot. Libra is a person with a balance; Sagittarius is a man armed with a bow, the hinder part of the body being that of a horse. Capricornus is a shark with the face of a deer. Gemini constitute a pair of human beings bearing a harp and a mace. Virgo is a woman standing in a boat carrying with her corn and fire. The remaining signs correspond to things with properties indicated by their respective names. Each one of them inhabits the region appropriate thereto.

verse_data.translation: Sloka. 9. Sign Pisces consists of two fishes with their two tails and heads in reversed positions. Aquarius is symbolised by a man with a pot. Libra is a person with a balance; Sagittarius is a man armed with a bow, the hinder part of the body being that of a horse. Capricornus is a shark with the face of a deer. Gemini constitute a pair of human beings bearing a harp and a mace. Virgo is a woman standing in a boat carrying with her corn and fire. The remaining signs correspond to things with properties indicated by their respective names. Each one of them inhabits the region appropriate thereto.
verse_data.topic: Detailed descriptions of Pisces, Aquarius, Libra, Sagittarius, Capricornus, Gemini, and Virgo

raw_text:
Sl. 8-9.
अथमोऽध्यायः
NOTES
१. बृ. जा. 1.4. The 12 Rasis are supposed to represent the
several parts of the body of Kalapurusha (कालपुरुष), Mesha (Aries)
representing the head and so on.
०१. सारावली
शीर्षांस्यबादुहृदयं जठरं कठिवस्तिमेह नौरुयुगम् ।
जानू जसे चरणों कालस्याङ्गानि राशयोऽजाद्याः ॥
The object of this division is also distinctly expressed
in the same work thus:
कालनरस्यावयवान् पुरुषाणां कल्पयेत्प्रसवकाले ।
सदसद्‌द्महसंयोगात्पुष्टान् सोपद्रवांश्चापि ।।
.., to find out the full growth or otherwise of the different
parts of the body of the owner of the horoscope according as the
Ras is typifying them are connected with benefic or malefic planets,
In the case of all horoscopes, the several parts of the body
referred to above should be understood to be represented by the
signs beginning from the Lagna.
व्यत्यस्तोभयपुच्छमस्तकयुतौ मीनौ सकुंभो नर-
स्तौली चापधरस्तुरंगजघनो नक्रो मृगास्यो भवेत् ।
वीणाढ्यं सगर्द नृयुग्ममबला नौस्था ससस्यानला
शेषाः स्वस्वगुणाभिधानसदृशाः सर्वे खदेशाश्रयाः ॥ ९ ॥
